channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Wet Hot American Summer Cast and Creators Announce 25th Anniversary Concert Tour
item.description: ✨ Grab your sunscreen and get ready to jam out with the Wet Hot American Summer crew on their 25th anniversary concert tour! 🎵🌞 #WetHotSummerTour 🚌

item.title: Lemonade Turns 10
item.description: 🍋 Squeeze the day! Beyoncé's iconic album Lemonade celebrates its 10th birthday today. Let's raise a glass to this masterpiece! 🎉 #LemonadeTurns10

item.title: Wild Nothing add East Coast dates with Deakin to ‘Gemini’ tour
item.description: 🎶 East Coast vibes incoming! @WildNothing & Deakin are teaming up for more 'Gemini' tour dates! 🌟 Don't miss out! 🚀 #MusicalAdventures

item.title: 50th Anniversary of Ramones’ Debut Album To Be Celebrated with Reissues, Museum Exhibit, and Special Events
item.description: 🎸 Punk's not dead! Celebrate 50 years of Ramones with reissues, exhibits, and events! Let's rock! 🤘 #Ramones50 #PunkRock

item.title: Live Nation selling $30 “all-in” tickets to over 4,000 shows
item.description: 🎉 Score $30 tickets to 4,000+ shows with @LiveNation! Your wallet and dancing shoes will thank you! 💸🎶 #LiveNation #ConcertDeals
